summary: Completed comprehensive testing of The Imperium app. All 12 requested features are working perfectly. Backend APIs (23/23 passing), frontend functionality, and database integration all functioning correctly.
passed_tests: Doctrines panel opens from sidebar 'The Doctrines' button
All 7 doctrines displayed (Axiom, Oath, Creed, Litany, Covenant, Manifesto, Four-Word Form)
The Litany shows line-by-line breakdown with explanations
Meditations show detailed beginner instructions when selected
Meditations show 'Why we do this' explanation
Rite page shows 'Before You Begin' section with preparation requirements
Rite page shows Permanent Record section
Rite completion saves to database permanently
Rite inscription is recorded with completion
All 6 Rite stages show detailed instructions
Challenge coin link works after rite completion
Backend API endpoints (23/23 passing - 100% success rate)
Database integration and permanent record storage
Meditation timer functionality with sound controls
Rite stage progression and completion workflow
